body.title: CLOSED: Migrate word_graph.py to native Postgres SQL
body.result: word_graph.py fully migrated: INSTR→strpos, INSERT OR REPLACE/IGNORE→ON CONFLICT, ?→%s, SELECT changes()→RETURNING; 4483 tests pass; commit 8cf0af9a
body.description:
word_graph.py has several SQLite-isms that route through db_proxy's shim:

- Line 287: `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO wg_meta (key, value) VALUES ('word_count', ?)` → `ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value`, `%s`
- Lines 387/399/413/425: already use ON CONFLICT syntax but still have `?` → change to `%s`
- Line 464: `INSERT OR IGNORE INTO wg_word_lang (word, lang) VALUES (?, ?)` → `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`, `%s`
- Line 487: `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO wg_idf (word, score) VALUES (?, ?)` → `ON CONFLICT (word) DO UPDATE SET score = EXCLUDED.score`, `%s`
- Lines 776, 810, 828, 845: `INSTR(col, '__') = 0` → `strpos(col, '__') = 0`
- Lines 511, 519, 582, 585, 599, 779, 789, 809, 812, 830, 832, 845, 861, 918, 919: `?` placeholders → `%s`

Note: Lines 334–347 already use strpos in index creation — skip those.

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py`
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database — native Postgres syntax only
**Scope boundary:** word_graph.py only; do not touch db_proxy.py shim yet.
**Test plan:** Run full test suite; grep confirms no `INSERT OR REPLACE`, `INSERT OR IGNORE`, `INSTR(` in word_graph.py after change.
**Pass condition:** All tests green; `grep -n 'INSERT OR REPLACE\|INSERT OR IGNORE\|INSTR(' wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py` returns 0 results; word graph queries return expected results.

Validation: Igor word-graph query log shows no SQL syntax errors; wg_meta/wg_idf upserts succeed.
Cleanup: test fixtures via conftest.
